source_name: Taiwan Construction Map homepage and active GeoJSON policy check
changes: Aligned homepage progress metric from 3,000 long-term reach to 300 phase-one active projects.
Updated homepage active-data public copy to match allowed states: planned, under evaluation, in design, under construction, or completed/opened within one month.

Updated the homepage progress filter so tender-prep, tendering, delayed, and generic planning states no longer count toward the 300 active target unless later normalized into allowed states by source evidence.
Kept OpenStreetMap attribution and first-screen fallback behavior unchanged.
exclusion_reason: These states are not part of the latest active-data hard gate unless official source evidence maps them to planning, evaluation, or design status.

performance_check.homepage_full_card_render_limit: Do not render 300+ full project cards at once.

next_priority_sources: 公共工程委員會與政府電子採購資料
各縣市政府工程與建設局處
環評書件與主管機關公告
notes: No unverified candidate projects were mixed into active data in this run.
